jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Extramarks
jsonLd.description:
Extramarks, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Extramarks:
Extramarks is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Extramarks!
